Aliza

Trade Binance Futures from one place. Telegram is the backend.

Log in with Telegram

One click — same account as the bot.

Or use a username & password
Register / Log in
Open position

Pick a side, size and levels — you'll Confirm before anything places.

Commands

Market data, goals, backtest, close — trades ask to Confirm first.
